title: Biofertilizers as nutrient coextends of other sources for rainfed crops
abstract:
This article deals with microbial inoculants of
N,-fixing bacteria, vesicular arbuscuJar
mycorrhiwe (VAM), phosphate solubilizers and 
plant-growth promoting rhizobacteria (PGPR) and
They, role in production of crops. Factors
determining the success of inoculants  technology
along with a survey on their field performance are
discussed. The rhizobial inoculants are deals in
greater detail as a general example, and for the
ether inoculants the discussion is restricted 10 the
points which are specific to a particular group of
inoculants. To popularize biofertilizers amongst
farmers a holistic approach covering production of
quality inoculants, selecting areas which need
inoculationi, raining and educating extensionl staff
. and appropriate crop management practices is
suggested
